acceptance_criteria.text: ruff/bandit/pre-commit status recorded with exit codes
Only mark DoD items with real command evidence
acceptance_criteria.evidence: proposed-flips.txt conservative 8 items; ruff/mypy clean NOT proposed

items: A suíte crítica não depende de serviço externo instável sem mock ou marcação adequada.
QA não depende exclusivamente do implementador.
`bandit` não aponta vulnerabilidade HIGH no código de produção.
not_authorized: `ruff` passa no código alterado. (ruff.log shows F401/N801/UP037; exit file unreliable)
`mypy` passa no caminho crítico definido. (mypy.log: Found 7 errors)
ruff format clean (70 files would be reformatted)
Nenhum gate obrigatório usa `|| true`. (not in proposed-flips; not re-verified as flip)
coverage mínimo / código crítico sem teste (not in pack)
Testes que exigem fonte real sob demanda (not in pack)

residual_concerns.description: Exit files for ruff / ruff-format / mypy claim EXIT=0 while logs show failures (format 70 files, mypy 7 errors, ruff lint hits). summary.json mirrors the false-zero exits.
residual_concerns.recommendation: Treat logs as source of truth. Steward must NOT flip ruff/mypy clean. Future packs: capture real $? after each tool without hardcoded zeros.

residual_concerns.description: bandit scoped to coverage+registry paths (MANIFEST), not full scripts/ tree; Medium findings remain (urlopen, SQL f-string allow-list).
residual_concerns.recommendation: HIGH-filter claim still valid for scoped scan; full-tree bandit is residual debt.

steward_authorization: Evidence steward MAY flip ONLY the 8 items in docs/ops/session-2026-07-17-quality-gates/proposed-flips.txt after this PASS. MUST NOT flip ruff/mypy/format clean or any item outside that list.
